description: Add hex-to-oklch conversion fallback in Color Resolver's resolve_sources() method so hex values from the admin color picker are properly resolved instead of silently falling back to defaults.
steps: Add a private static srgb_to_linear($c) method that inverts the linear_to_srgb() gamma function.
Add a private static hex_to_oklch($hex) method that converts hex -> RGB -> linear sRGB -> LMS -> OKLab -> OKLch, returning [L, C, H] or null.
In resolve_sources(), after parse_oklch() returns null, add a fallback that tries hex_to_oklch() on the value before falling back to the default.
acceptance_criteria: php -l integrations/bricks/includes/class-color-resolver.php passes with no syntax errors
resolve_sources() handles hex color values (e.g. #3a6be5) by converting them to oklch [L, C, H] arrays
The srgb_to_linear() method correctly inverts the linear_to_srgb() transfer function
hex_to_oklch() returns null for invalid/non-hex inputs
If parse_oklch() succeeds, hex_to_oklch() is not called (existing behavior preserved)
verification: Run php -l on integrations/bricks/includes/class-color-resolver.php to confirm valid syntax
